Title: King Size Beige Grid Button-Up Shirt With matching Shorts
Description: A short-sleeved button-up shirt and matching shorts in a light beige color with a white grid pattern, sized King Size. The shirt features a classic collared neckline and appears to be in good condition with minimal wear. Suitable for casual wear or as a base layer.

Title: Pair of Native American Themed Porcelain Dolls
Description: Two decorative porcelain dolls dressed in traditional Native American-inspired clothing with brown suede-like outfits, beaded details, and distinctive headwear. The dolls feature painted facial features and are adorned with ornamental beading and fringe. These vintage collectible dolls are in good condition with minor wear consistent with age.

Title: Decorative Hand-Painted Serving Trays (Pair)
Description: A pair of vintage decorative serving trays featuring hand-painted still life designs with fruits, grapes, and floral arrangements on dark backgrounds. Each tray has curved sides with metal handles and displays traditional folk art styling. Shows signs of age with some wear to the paint and finish consistent with vintage use.
